backendConfig.connectFirst: Connect to the local service first
backendConfig.savedReloadHint: Settings reloaded. Some options (e.g. port) may require a service restart.
backendConfig.autoReloadFailed: Auto reload failed. Click Restart manually.
backendConfig.desktopSaveFailed: Failed to save Desktop settings; LocalBridge settings will still be saved.
backendConfig.desktopRootSaveFailed: Failed to save Desktop root directory settings:
backendConfig.title: LocalBridge settings
backendConfig.listenPortTooltip: WebSocket listen port; restart service after changing
backendConfig.rootDirTooltip: Root path for file scanning; restart service after changing. Applies only when LocalBridge uses a config file or in Desktop.
backendConfig.rootDirExtra: Applies only when LB is started with --config or in Desktop.
backendConfig.libDirTooltip: Path to the bin directory of the MaaFramework Release package
backendConfig.ocrResourceDirTooltip: For OCR assistance only. Specify a resource directory containing OCR (folders like pipeline, model — usually under /resource or /base). Pipeline files are not required and will not be scanned; set root directory to scan pipelines.
backendConfig.footerHint: Note: some settings (port, root directory) require a backend restart to take effect.

colorModal.waitForScreenshot: Wait for the screenshot to load
colorModal.channelMismatch: Color bound channel count does not match the current color mode
colorModal.pickFirst: Click on the screenshot to pick a color first
colorModal.title: Color picker
colorModal.clickToPick: Click on the screenshot to pick a color

createFile.duplicateHelp: A file with this name already exists in this directory. Use a different name.
createFile.notConnected: Not connected to the local service; cannot create file
createFile.requestFailed: Failed to send file creation request
createFile.title: New local file
createFile.fileNameInvalid: File name cannot contain special characters \ / : * ? " < > |
createFile.fileNamePlaceholder: e.g. pipeline or pipeline.json or pipeline.jsonc
createFile.directoryRequired: Select or enter a save directory
createFile.noDirectory: No directory available. Connect to the local service first.
createFile.saveCurrentContent: Save current editor content to the new file
createFile.hintAutoExt: • Without an extension, .json is appended automatically
createFile.hintPath: • Quick directory picks are relative paths; manual input must be absolute
createFile.hintRefresh: • File is created in the chosen directory; the file list refreshes on success
createFile.hintSaveContent: • "Save current editor content to new file" compiles canvas nodes to Pipeline and writes the new file. You can click Add on the tab bar first, then New local file.

deltaModal.selectPointsFirst: Drag on the screenshot to select start and end points first
deltaModal.title: Position delta
deltaModal.hintHorizontal: Drag on the screenshot from start to end to compute horizontal displacement.
deltaModal.hintVertical: Drag on the screenshot from start to end to compute vertical displacement.

exportFile.title: Export to file
exportFile.fileNameInvalid: File name cannot contain special characters \ / : * ? " < > |
exportFile.hintCompile: • Compiles current canvas content to Pipeline and exports
exportFile.hintSeparated: • In separated mode, export Pipeline, config, or both
exportFile.hintDownload: • Uses browser download to save locally

fieldSort.title: Field sort settings
fieldSort.hint: Drag fields to reorder; export uses this order.

guardPrompt.defaultDescription: The following settings are not configured and may affect functionality:

ocrModal.selectRegionFirst: Select a region on the screenshot first
ocrModal.title: OCR text preview
ocrModal.frontendModeLine1: • Recognizes from the current captured image
ocrModal.frontendModeBenefit2: ✓ Avoids mismatch when the window updates
ocrModal.frontendModeWarning: ⚠️ Results may differ from native OCR
ocrModal.resultPlaceholder: After selecting a region on the screenshot, text is recognized automatically
ocrModal.negativeX: • Negative x: measured from the right edge
ocrModal.negativeY: • Negative y: measured from the bottom edge
ocrModal.negativeAbs: • Negative w/h: absolute value; (x, y) is the bottom-right corner

ocrModal.tooltipNegativeY: Negative values are from the bottom edge
